Petition For Authority To Expend Trust Funds For Repairs To Real Property In Marital Trust And For Authority For Co-Trustee Harrison L. Roebke, Jr. To Serve As The General Contractor With Power To Hire Subcontractors
Off Calendar Mar-07-2017 Off Calendar

Petition For Authority To Expend Trust Funds For Repairs To Real Property In Marital Trust And For Authority For Co-Trustee Harrison L. Roebke, Jr. To Serve As The General Contractor With Power To Hire Subcontractors
Off Calendar Feb-14-2017 Continued To Mar-07-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy A. Jaime. (Not reported)

Petition For Authority To Expend Trust Funds For Repairs To Real Property In Marital Trust And For Authority For Co-Trustee Harrison L. Roebke, Jr. To Serve As The General Contractor With Power To Hire Subcontractors
Off Calendar Jan-31-2017 Continued To Feb-14-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg for Harrison Roebke Jr.

The Court expressed concern about the scope of work not being precise, it not being clear that a successful bid process was entered into, about a Co-Trustee without a contractors' license and experience being allowed to take on the work and the Co-Trustee not being committed to completion of the work. Ms. Friedeberg stated that the Co-Trustee tried multiple times to get contractors to provide bids and couldn't, that he contacted numerous contractors and that the dollar amounts presented were from them eyeballing what needs to be done. Ms. Friedeberg also stated that the proposal of the Co-Trustee doing the work is because it would be less expensive, that the cap includes Trustee fees, made reference to the list of proposed work (item 6 in the petition) and stated that the intent is to rent out the property and generate income to provide care. The Petition for Authority to Expend Trust Funds for Repairs to Real Property, etc. is continued to February 14, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Friedeberg to provide specific scope of the work to be done, to see if anyone will bid and what the alternative is that's being proposed, what the Trustee will do and what the money will be buying.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Duong. Not reported.
